# Chain vs segment selection scope. The UI exposes two selection
# modes:
#
#   * chain — single click on an aisle edge selects the entire
#     collinear run (the whole row or column)
#   * segment — double-click narrows to just the clicked sub-edge
#
# Emits-annotation shape: chain covers every sub-edge in the chain,
# segment covers only the seed. A chain-mode cycle on a row, then a
# segment-mode cycle on the same row, must produce two distinct
# direction annotations (not fold into one).

polygon outer
(0,0)
(400,0)
(400,300)
(0,300)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(400,300), area 120000

set stalls-per-face=4
----

generate
----
total_stalls: 106
faces: 29 (boundary: 1, interior: 28)
graph: 56 vertices, 97 edges (perimeter: 26, interior: 71)
regions: 1

# Chain-mode direction on a horizontal row. Chain expansion walks
# the whole row, so the emitted annotation extents span every cell
# in it.
annotation direction
near=(200,120) mode=chain traffic=two-way-reverse
----
annotation direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-7,lattice:0 traffic=two-way-reverse

annotations
----
direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-7,lattice:0 traffic=two-way-reverse

# Segment-mode direction on the same row. Extents collapse to just
# the seed sub-edge; 'f' on the distinct scope creates a second
# annotation rather than cycling the row-wide one.
annotation direction
near=(200,120) mode=segment traffic=two-way-reverse
----
annotation direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-4,lattice:-3 traffic=two-way-reverse

annotations
----
direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-7,lattice:0 traffic=two-way-reverse
direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-4,lattice:-3 traffic=two-way-reverse

# Chain-mode delete on a vertical column. Chain expansion picks up
# the whole column.
annotation delete-edge
near=(200,180) mode=chain
----
annotation delete-edge on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=x coord=-4 range=lattice:0,lattice:6

annotations
----
direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-7,lattice:0 traffic=two-way-reverse
direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-4,lattice:-3 traffic=two-way-reverse
delete-edge on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=x coord=-4 range=lattice:0,lattice:6

# Segment-mode delete on a horizontal sub-edge. After the chain
# delete above the graph regenerates; extents match the seed.
annotation delete-edge
near=(200,180) mode=segment
----
annotation delete-edge on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=x coord=-4 range=lattice:3,lattice:4

annotations
----
direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-7,lattice:0 traffic=two-way-reverse
direction on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=y coord=2 range=lattice:-4,lattice:-3 traffic=two-way-reverse
delete-edge on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=x coord=-4 range=lattice:0,lattice:6
delete-edge on=grid region=0x0001000000000000 axis=x coord=-4 range=lattice:3,lattice:4
